Who We Are

Bridging the Gap Between Soil and Soul

Based in Pune, Zad Global Trade is a premier exporter of high-quality agricultural produce. We specialise in sourcing pomegranates and bananas directly from farmers, ensuring that every piece of fruit meets international standards of freshness and taste.

Our partnerships with certified farms across Maharashtra allow us to maintain strict traceability and deliver consistent, premium quality to importers across Asia and the Middle East.

🌱 Farm Fresh Direct sourcing from controlled farms in India.
🚢 Export Ready Sophisticated logistics and cold-chain management.
✅ Verified International quality Standards.

Our Growing Impact

Through our dedicated network, we empower local farming communities while delivering premium Indian produce to markets across Asia and the Middle East.

🌍
5+ Nations Served
📦
100% Traceability
🤝
20+ Partner Farms
🏆
Export GRADE QUALITY
